zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Dampierre於大約1160年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯時，她的父親Guillaume Ier de Dampierre36歲，母親Ermengarde de Toucy36歲。她和Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1228年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Dampierre于大约1160年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯时，她的父亲Guillaume Ier de Dampierre36岁，母亲Ermengarde de Toucy36岁。她和Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1228年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Dampierre was born about 1160, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, was 36 and her mother, Ermengarde de Toucy, was 36. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I. She died about 1228, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Dampierre est née environ 1160, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Toucy, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I. Elle est décédée environ 1228, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Dampierre um 1160 in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume Ier de Dampierre 36 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de Toucy 36. Sie hatte mit Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1228 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Dampierre è nata il circa 1160 nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de Toucy, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I. Morì circa 1228, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Dampierreが約1160年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier de Dampierreは36歳，母Ermengarde de Toucyは36歳であった。彼女はGeoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun Iとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1228年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Dampierre(이)가 대략 1160년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume Ier de Dampierre(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de Toucy(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1228년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
